patches.summary: Allow Gumroad nested-resource store rows when responses omit parent IDs.
patches.reason: Gumroad nested endpoints are scoped by URL path, but their response bodies do not consistently echo product or sale parent IDs. Nullable indexed parent columns keep sync/search usable without rejecting otherwise valid rows.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes for the generated Gumroad CLI.

patches.summary: Honor tail --follow=false by returning after the initial poll and route tail output through Cobra streams.
patches.reason: The generated tail command declared a single-poll flag but ignored it, causing scripts and agents to hang until interrupted. It also wrote directly to os.Stdout/os.Stderr, bypassing command output writers used by MCP transports and tests.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes for the generated Gumroad CLI.

patches.summary: Preserve the credential source label when constructing Authorization headers.
patches.reason: AuthHeader previously rewrote config-file tokens as env-derived tokens and left a duplicate unreachable access-token branch.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes for the generated Gumroad CLI.

patches.summary: Return a clear error for expired Gumroad tokens instead of using stale credentials.
patches.reason: The generated refresh hook was a no-op, so expired-token configs would continue sending invalid credentials without surfacing the real remediation.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes for the generated Gumroad CLI.

patches.summary: Use the generic local FTS index when search runs without a type filter and resource-scoped FTS when --type is provided.
patches.reason: The generated no-type search branch initialized dedupe state but never queried the local database, and the first fallback fix made typed searches unscoped.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes for the generated Gumroad CLI.
